title: 7 from Cradock compete in CT Marathon
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Seven athletes from Bonakele Running Academy in Cradock travelled to Cape Town to complete the 2024 Cape Town Marathon on 19 October.The following results were achieved:","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Seven athletes from Bonakele Running Academy in Cradock travelled to Cape Town to complete the 2024 Cape Town Marathon on 19 October.
The following results were achieved:"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"10km"},{"type":"list","items":["Bonakele Ntshangase 01:43 record disabled persons","Asanda Schutte 0:55","Siphesihle Nani 01:42 women","Lelethu Nani 01:35 women"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"42km","html":"42km"},{"type":"list","items":["Thokoza Galada 04:51 women","Siphiwo Mnyumbela 03:10","Nomiselo Mhletyane 4 hours women","Themba Mzamo 4 hours"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
